name: context-menu

metadata.response:
Item Details:

## context-menu
**Type:** registry:ui
**Files:** 1 file(s)
**Dependencies:** radix-ui

visual_summary: A context menu is a dropdown list that appears when a user interacts with an element to provide additional options. It is commonly used in applications with complex interfaces to offer context-specific actions. Developers can use this component to provide users with a list of relevant actions at the right moment.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: context-menu
Description: A context menu is a dropdown list that appears when a user interacts with an element to provide additional options. It is commonly used in applications with complex interfaces to offer context-specific actions. Developers can use this component to provide users with a list of relevant actions at the right moment.
Style: e.g. dark, minimal
Interactions: e.g. dropdown animation, hover, clickable
Tags: dropdown, menu, options, actions, interface

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
